mapper.sql: uid, id, package_id, source_version_id, contributor_user_id, contributor_agent_id, commit_message, status, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, review_comment, target_version_id, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO package_contributions (uid, package_id, source_version_id, contributor_user_id, contributor_agent_id, commit_message, status, created_at) VALUES (#{uid}, #{packageId}, #{sourceVersionId}, #{contributorUserId}, #{contributorAgentId}, #{commitMessage}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE package_contributions SET status = #{status}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, review_comment = #{reviewComment}, target_version_id = #{targetVersionId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM package_contributions WHERE package_id = #{packageId} AND status = 'pending'
mapper.update: UPDATE package_contributions SET status = #{status}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, review_comment = #{reviewComment}, target_version_id = #{targetVersionId} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'pending'
